scenarios.title: Chess: back-rank mate in one
scenarios.prompt: White to move from the FEN. Return the legal move that checkmates black in one.

expectedActions.label: Re8#
expectedActions.note: The rook gives back-rank mate.

scenarios.title: Chess: queen mate in one
scenarios.prompt: White to move from the FEN. Return the legal queen move that checkmates black.

expectedActions.label: Qg7#
expectedActions.note: The queen is protected by the king and boxes black into the corner.

scenarios.title: Chess: knight captures a loose queen
scenarios.prompt: White to move from the FEN. Return the legal knight move that wins black's queen.

expectedActions.label: Nxd4
expectedActions.note: The knight legally captures the queen on d4.

scenarios.title: Chess: promote the passed pawn
scenarios.prompt: White to move from the FEN. Return the legal promotion move that makes a queen.

expectedActions.label: a8=Q
expectedActions.note: Promote the pawn to a queen.
